items.caption: A vintage book cover with a historical theme. the title "the history of the united states" is prominently displayed in large, bold, red letters at the top. below the title, there is a circular portrait of a man in a tricorn hat, suggesting a historical figure. the author's name, "josephine pollard," is at the bottom in smaller white text. the cover features an illustration depicting a scene from american history, with figures in period attire, including a man standing on a boat, and a ship in the background. the illustration is rendered in a style typical of the late 19th or early 20th century. the bottom of the cover has a yellow banner with the text "told in one syllable words," indicating the book's unique approach to storytelling. the overall style of the image is reminiscent of a classic american history textbook.
